name: Jane D.
comment: Loved browsing through this site — clean, warm, and full of personality. The coffee shop theme is such a fun touch!

name: Mark T.
comment: Great portfolio! Would love to see more project breakdowns, but overall a really solid first impression.

name: Riza P.
comment: The attention to detail in the design is amazing. Feels like a real café menu but for code projects. Love it!
